
### coverage-guided example 

<!-- \lstset{language=C,style=script} -->
  

::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/testing/texfig/coverageSame.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageSame.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageSame.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageSame.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::


### coverage-guided example 

<!-- \lstset{language=C,style=smaller} -->
  

::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/testing/texfig/coverageExBig.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageExBig.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageExBig.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/testing/texfig/coverageExBig.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::
